title: Write ferrum_extlib_font.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_font: FreeType 2 wrapper for font loading, glyph rasterization, and atlas management. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: font loading (TTF/OTF), glyph rasterization, metrics and kerning, glyph atlas management, variable font support (OpenType Font Variations axes), abstraction over FreeType so callers do not depend on it directly.
